tasks.label: Setup React Frontend
tasks.command: npx create-react-app octofit-tracker/frontend --template cra-template --use-npm && npm install bootstrap --prefix octofit-tracker/frontend && npm install react-router-dom --prefix octofit-tracker/frontend && sed -i "1iimport 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css';" octofit-tracker/frontend/src/index.js
